errors.meaning: The daily brief ran and generated output but an internal Slack message tool call failed during execution (agent output was still delivered, but the job finished in error state)
errors.suggestedFix: Check delivery config for daily-brief — ensure target uses explicit format 'channel:C0AMSE2TW2X'; inspect agent run logs for which message call failed

errors.meaning: On first run after job creation, the delivery target was not in a valid Slack ID format — the channel was not recognized
errors.suggestedFix: Delivery config was missing explicit channel ID prefix; update to 'channel:C0AMSE2TW2X' (already partially fixed in state, but consecutiveErrors persist)
